properties.name: paygate.enabled
properties.description: Whether L402 payment-gated access is enabled. When false, the L402 security filter is not registered and all endpoints are accessible without payment.

properties.name: paygate.backend
properties.description: Lightning Network backend to use for invoice creation and payment verification. Must match a configured backend module on the classpath.

properties.name: paygate.default-price-sats
properties.description: Default price in satoshis charged for payment-protected endpoints. Individual endpoints can override this via @PaymentRequired annotation or a custom PaygatePricingStrategy.

properties.name: paygate.default-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Default invoice expiry timeout in seconds. The Lightning invoice will expire and become unpayable after this duration.

properties.name: paygate.service-name
properties.description: Logical name of the service, embedded in macaroon caveats for service-scoped authorization. Used by ServicesCaveatVerifier to restrict tokens to specific services.

properties.name: paygate.root-key-store
properties.description: Root key storage backend for macaroon signing keys. 'file' persists keys to disk; 'memory' keeps keys in-memory (lost on restart).

properties.name: paygate.root-key-store-path
properties.description: File system path for the file-based root key store. Only used when paygate.root-key-store=file. The directory is created automatically if it does not exist.

properties.name: paygate.credential-cache-max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of validated credentials to cache. Higher values use more memory but reduce re-verification overhead.

properties.name: paygate.security-mode
properties.description: Security mode controlling which L402 authentication path is active. 'auto' (default) detects Spring Security on the classpath and uses spring-security mode if present. 'servlet' forces the PaygateSecurityFilter servlet path. 'spring-security' forces the Spring Security integration path.

properties.name: paygate.test-mode
properties.description: Enable test mode which uses an in-memory Lightning backend that auto-settles invoices. Must NOT be used in production. When enabled, no real Lightning node connection is required.

properties.name: paygate.trust-forwarded-headers
properties.description: Whether to trust X-Forwarded-For headers for client IP resolution. When false (default), the filter always uses the direct connection remote address, preventing rate-limit bypass via header spoofing. Enable only when running behind a trusted reverse proxy.

properties.name: paygate.rate-limit.requests-per-second
properties.description: Token refill rate per second for the challenge rate limiter. Controls the sustained request rate allowed per client IP before 402 challenges are throttled.

properties.name: paygate.rate-limit.burst-size
properties.description: Maximum burst size (token bucket capacity) for the challenge rate limiter. Allows short bursts of requests above the sustained rate before throttling kicks in.

properties.name: paygate.lightning.timeout-seconds
properties.description: Global timeout in seconds for Lightning backend RPC/HTTP calls. Used as the default for both LND and LNbits backends. Backend-specific properties (paygate.lnd.rpc-deadline-seconds, paygate.lnbits.request-timeout-seconds) override this value when set.

properties.name: paygate.lnbits.request-timeout-seconds
properties.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds for LNbits API calls. Overrides paygate.lightning.timeout-seconds when set. If not set, the global lightning timeout is used.

properties.name: paygate.lnbits.connect-timeout-seconds
properties.description: TCP connect timeout in seconds for the LNbits HTTP client. Defaults to 10 seconds if not set.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.rpc-deadline-seconds
properties.description: Deadline in seconds for individual LND gRPC calls. Overrides paygate.lightning.timeout-seconds when set. If not set, the global lightning timeout is used.

properties.name: paygate.lnbits.url
properties.description: Base URL of the LNbits instance (e.g., https://lnbits.example.com). Required when paygate.backend=lnbits.

properties.name: paygate.lnbits.api-key
properties.description: LNbits admin API key for invoice creation and payment lookup. Required when paygate.backend=lnbits. Keep this value secret.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.host
properties.description: Hostname or IP address of the LND gRPC endpoint. Required when paygate.backend=lnd.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.port
properties.description: Port number of the LND gRPC endpoint.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.tls-cert-path
properties.description: File system path to the LND TLS certificate (tls.cert). Required when paygate.backend=lnd for secure gRPC connections.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.macaroon-path
properties.description: File system path to the LND admin macaroon file (admin.macaroon). Required when paygate.backend=lnd for authenticated gRPC calls.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.keep-alive-time-seconds
properties.description: Interval in seconds between gRPC keepalive pings sent to the LND node. Helps detect broken connections and keep the channel alive through firewalls and load balancers.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.keep-alive-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for a keepalive ping acknowledgement from the LND node. If no response is received within this duration, the connection is considered dead.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.idle-timeout-minutes
properties.description: Duration in minutes after which an idle gRPC connection to the LND node is closed. Helps free resources when the connection is not actively used.

properties.name: paygate.lnd.max-inbound-message-size
properties.description: Maximum size in bytes for inbound gRPC messages from the LND node. Increase if LND responses (e.g., large channel lists) exceed the default 4 MB limit.

properties.name: paygate.metrics.max-endpoint-cardinality
properties.description: Maximum number of distinct endpoint tag values tracked in L402 metrics before new values are replaced with the overflow sentinel. Prevents unbounded cardinality in TSDB backends.

properties.name: paygate.metrics.overflow-tag-value
properties.description: Tag value used for the endpoint dimension when the cardinality cap is exceeded. All overflow endpoints are bucketed under this single value.

properties.name: paygate.protocols.l402.enabled
properties.description: Whether the L402 protocol is enabled. When true, the gateway issues L402 macaroon+invoice challenges and accepts L402 credentials.

properties.name: paygate.protocols.mpp.enabled
properties.description: Whether the MPP (Message Payment Protocol) is enabled. 'auto' enables MPP when challenge-binding-secret is configured, 'true' forces MPP on (fails fast if secret is missing), 'false' disables MPP entirely.

properties.name: paygate.protocols.mpp.challenge-binding-secret
properties.description: HMAC secret used to bind MPP payment challenges to specific requests. Must be at least 32 bytes. Required when MPP is enabled. Keep this value secret.

values.description: Auto-detect: use spring-security mode if Spring Security is on the classpath, otherwise use servlet mode.
Force servlet filter mode. PaygateSecurityFilter handles all authentication and challenge issuance.
Force Spring Security mode. Uses L402AuthenticationFilter and L402AuthenticationEntryPoint within the Spring Security filter chain.
Use LNbits REST API as the Lightning backend.
Use LND gRPC as the Lightning backend.
Enable MPP automatically when challenge-binding-secret is configured.
Force MPP on. Startup fails if challenge-binding-secret is not set.
Disable MPP entirely, even if challenge-binding-secret is present.
Persist root keys to the file system at the configured path.
Keep root keys in memory only. Keys are lost on application restart.
